calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: J. Guandique. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2023 Continued To Nov-21-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to November 21, 2023 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (610)

NOTICE OF MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL
Off Calendar Nov-17-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michael Hale, Esq, (415.400.7002; hale@lmslaw.com) of Liuzzi....& Winnet LLP for Moving Party.
No other apperances.

In camera review hearing held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL for Plaintiff Paul Davis is GRANTED.

Order signed after hearing.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

Atty. FRANK LIUZZI, Esq. of Liuzzi Murphy Solomon Churton Hale & Winnett LLP (Tel: 415-400-7002) for movant;

HEARING RE: MICHAEL E. HALE'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF PAUL DAVIS.

The Court this matter to November 17, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion.
